title: Flashcard deck props
description: Deck of click-to-reveal cards. Blur-to-clear animation (not 3D flip). Per-card 'Got it' / 'Review' mastery persists to localStorage and the deck supports filtering by mastery status.

title.description: Optional heading shown above the deck

q.description: Front side — the question or prompt

a.description: Back side — the answer, 1-3 sentences ideal

showFilter.description: Show All/To-review filter bar. Default: true
